title: Canvas engine + pixel buffer + render pipeline
note: Passed Review+QA+objective gate first try on wf_-13. Worktree branched from U-001 (a21e10e) while master had advanced to U-002 (8750399); integrated by applying only the genuine U-003 changes (new src/core + src/platform engine files, additive barrel exports, vite.config held-out include) onto master and hand-merging the App.tsx/App.css semantic conflict (both U-002 showcase and U-003 canvas preview repurposed the App root). Merged App wraps the U-003 workbench+CanvasStage in U-002's ThemeProvider+CrtOverlay. Post-merge master: typecheck/test(138)/build/browser(14)/e2e(2) all exit 0, dist artifacts present, biome check . clean (fixed nested-root by gitignoring .claude/). Integrated 2026-07-01.
